name: Election to Allocate Basis to Low-Value Stock Rights

eligibility.description: Available when the fair market value of distributed stock rights is less than 15 percent of the fair market value of the old stock.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to allocate basis to stock rights even if their value is less than 15% of the old stock's value, rather than accepting a zero basis. This increases the basis of the rights, reducing gain upon their sale.
